ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the character in cm */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the character in kg */,
  "hair_color" TEXT /* Hair color of the character */,
  "skin_color" TEXT /* Skin color of the character */,
  "eye_color" TEXT /* Eye color of the character */,
  "birth_year" REAL /* Birth year of the character */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the character was last updated */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the character */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the character */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "average_height" INTEGER /* Average height of the species in cm */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "homeworld_id" INTEGER /* ID of the homeworld of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "homeworlds" (
  "homeworld_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each homeworld */,
  "homeworld_name" TEXT /* Name of the homeworld */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the homeworld */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the homeworld */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the homeworld was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the homeworld was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("homeworld_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_species" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_homeworlds" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "homeworld_id" INTEGER /* ID of the homeworld */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "homeworld_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content creator, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* Alias name of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alias was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alias was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aliases_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_vehicles" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "vehicle_id")
)
